---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an endpoint or capability for the SDK
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Which Airwallex endpoint or capability?**
Link to the relevant page of the [Airwallex API reference](https://www.airwallex.com/docs/api).

**What would the SDK call look like?**

```php
$client->something->method([/* ... */]);
```

**Anything else?**
Workarounds you're using today (e.g. `$client->request(...)` escape hatch),
constraints, related issues.
